title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Costco India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Costco India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Costco India in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costco India:
Costco India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India!
